functional_requirements.description: User can create account using email and password.

validations.description: Email uniqueness must be validated before account creation.
Password length must be at least 8 characters.

risks: No password complexity rules beyond minimum length (e.g., uppercase, numbers, special characters) may lead to weak passwords.
No email format validation specified could allow invalid email addresses.
No confirmation or verification step for email may result in unverified accounts.
missing_information: Email format validation rules (e.g., must contain '@' and domain).
Password complexity requirements (e.g., must include uppercase, lowercase, digit, special character).
Whether email verification is required before account activation.
Error messages for duplicate email or short password.
Whether the system supports password confirmation field during registration.

requirement_items.description: User can create account using email and password.
Email uniqueness must be validated before account creation.
Password length must be at least 8 characters.
